rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score of 6/10, and the substance of the assessment is unchanged: relevant C++ experience credited, lack of industrial automation and cloud platform experience flagged in both. The wording differs slightly (one folds cybersecurity into the concerns, the other cites IEC 62443 vs Modbus/IEC 61850), but these are reworded restatements of the same gaps and fall within ordinary run-to-run noise. Nothing in the variant keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Maria Rodriguez.
